identity.name: AI Access — Cross-Provider Rotation (OpenAI → Gemini → Anthropic)
identity.summary: Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-AIACC-005. Plane: AI_ACCESS. Primary technique: T1090. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.
identity.description:
Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-AIACC-005. Plane: AI_ACCESS. Primary technique: T1090. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.

Source scenario: SIM-AIACC-005.
UC: Cross-Provider Behaviour Stitching / TC: Single User Rotates Across Three AI Providers in <5 min.

prerequisites.description: Lab environment matching scenario SIM-AIACC-005 requirements.

payload.code:
# step-1: Provider 1 — OpenAI
cat > /tmp/aiacc-005-openai.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-AIACC-005
name: "AI Access — rotation step 1 OpenAI"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - api.openai.com
dry_run: false
tags: [ai-access, cross-provider, rotation]
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: llm_provider_egress
    params:
      provider: openai
      payload_type: source
      iterations: 1
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/aiacc-005-openai.yml --live
# step-2: Provider 2 — Gemini (overlapping content within 60s)
sleep 30
cat > /tmp/aiacc-005-gemini.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-AIACC-005
name: "AI Access — rotation step 2 Gemini"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - generativelanguage.googleapis.com
dry_run: false
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: llm_provider_egress
    params:
      provider: gemini
      payload_type: source
      iterations: 1
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/aiacc-005-gemini.yml --live
# step-3: Provider 3 — Anthropic completes the rotation triangle
sleep 30
cat > /tmp/aiacc-005-anthropic.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-AIACC-005
name: "AI Access — rotation step 3 Anthropic"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - api.anthropic.com
dry_run: false
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: llm_provider_egress
    params:
      provider: anthropic
      payload_type: source
      iterations: 1
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/aiacc-005-anthropic.yml --live
